name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for this accessory in HomeKit.

address.title: IP Address
address.description: LAN IP address of the air purifier.

model.title: Model
model.description: Xiaomi model identifier. Check the README for supported models.

filterChangeThreshold.title: Filter Change Warning Threshold
filterChangeThreshold.description: Show Change Filter warning when Filter Life reaches or drops below this value.

enableChildLockControl.title: Child Lock
enableChildLockControl.description: Expose Child Lock switch service in HomeKit.

enableBuzzerControl.title: Buzzer
enableBuzzerControl.description: Expose Buzzer on/off switch service in HomeKit.

condition.functionBody: try { return model['model'] !== 'zhimi.airpurifier.pro'; } catch(e) { return true; }

operationTimeoutMs.title: Operation Timeout (ms)
operationTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for read/write operations after connection.

reconnectDelayMs.title: Reconnect Delay (ms)
reconnectDelayMs.description: Maximum delay cap used by reconnect backoff policy (first retry starts fast, then increases up to this value).

exposeFilterReplaceAlertSensor.title: Expose Filter Replace Alert Sensor
exposeFilterReplaceAlertSensor.description: Adds an extra Contact Sensor service for filter replacement warning. Keep disabled to avoid duplicate warning tiles in Homebridge UI.

operationPollIntervalMs.title: Operation Poll Interval (ms)
operationPollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for control-related state refresh.

sensorPollIntervalMs.title: Sensor Poll Interval (ms)
sensorPollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval for slower sensor updates.

maskDeviceAddressInLogs.title: Mask Device IP in Logs
maskDeviceAddressInLogs.description: Mask device IP address in runtime logs (for privacy-sensitive deployments).

layout.helpvalue: Please check the README for instruction about how to get a token.

condition.functionBody: try { return model['model'] !== 'zhimi.airpurifier.pro'; } catch(e) { return true; }
